description: 2x2 feature grid with image cards on dark background

fields.name: Headline
fields.default: THIS AIN'T YOUR AVERAGE MINI GOLF

fields.name: Subheadline
fields.default: We went completely overboard — in the best way possible.

default.heading: 30+ ANIMATRONIC PIRATES
default.description: Life-size robotic buccaneers that move, talk, sing, and react to your game. Blackbeard guards the 18th hole. Captain Bones tells terrible jokes on the 7th. The parrot on hole 3 heckles everyone.

default.heading: SEVEN REAL WATERFALLS
default.description: Not a trickle. Real, thundering waterfalls. Putt under them. Putt through them. One of them actually parts like the sea when your ball approaches. You'll get a little misty. In both senses.

default.heading: TOWERING PIRATE STRUCTURES
default.description: A 40-foot fortress with real lookout towers. A full ship bow you putt through. A lighthouse you can see from the highway. These aren't decorations — they're destinations.

default.heading: CINEMATIC SOUNDTRACK
default.description: An original score plays through 40 hidden speakers. You'll hear sea shanties in the cove, thunder on Blackbeard's course, and the Kraken's roar echoing through the caves. It's a whole production.
